title: vanilla PvP
description: mods that make your game feel 10x smoother with 1k+ fps & optimize it for pvp!
body:
**NOTE:** for full functionality you would need to download marlow's cpvp optimizer with this pack, it could not be attached due to copyright reasons!

tired for being stuck with your game looking like a slideshow? this mod fixes that and gives you a frick ton of pvp mods to provide you **THE ULTIMATE** pvp experience!

### MAKE SURE to configure sodium settings e.g. fog and fast render & inventory hud for full experience!

# FEATURES
- get more **FPS**!
- multiple mods that make your game look **SICK** such as **3D skins**
- **apple skin** makes you actually see your saturation bar, insanely useful for almost any pvp gamemodes or just **survival vanilla** gameplay!
- ever tired for your sprint getting reset upon death, **worry no more**
- **better mount hud** to stay locked in even when on a horse!
- **better ping display** to give your friends the excuse of high ping :)
- **carpet pvp** doesn't affect anything in multiplayer but is useful in pvp practice maps, especially theobald's! you can find theobald's practice map from theo's discord server which is linked in the bio of his yt channel
- **clumps** to byebye the lag caused from xp orbs
- **crosshair indicator** to lock your aim, this gets 10x easier with a vibrant hit color with the **hit color** mod
- **dynamic fps** to keep your pc happy :D
- **emoji type**, pretty self-explanatory!
- **multiple shield optimizations**!
- the mod of all mods **ESSENTIAL**
- fabric skyboxes to achieve the most of my texture pack
- fullbright :O
- **remove reloading screen** to not get farmed whilst loading the server resource pack!
- **better sodium options** and s24 ultra **zoom**
- **inventory hud** to lock in even more #lockin
- count those **totems** and flex your **lt3** crystal!
- **shulker box tooltips** to SEE DA SHULKAHS
